candidate_definition_hints.text: This is an implementation of [DeepLab-LargeFOV](http://ccvl.stat.ucla.edu/deeplab-models/deeplab-largefov/) in TensorFlow for semantic image segmentation on [PASCAL VOC dataset](http://host.robots.ox.ac.uk/pascal/VOC/).
